content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To : Gina and Alice                                    Date : 3-14-78


From : FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
       Mickey Bennett

Subject: New procedure regarding appeals of fines for late-filed
         statements of economic interest.

         At its meeting on March 7, 1978, the Commission de-
cided henceforth to handle fine appeals in the following
manner:

         1. The appellant's request for appeal will be
provided to the commissioners and a date specified by
which each must contact the Executive Director if he or
she believes the appeal should be placed on the agenda
of a regular Commission meeting.

         2. An appeal will be placed on the agenda if
two or more commissioners so request by the specified
date. If one or fewer commissioners so request, the
appellant will be informed that the Commission has denied
the appeal.

MB;jo

cc Ted Prim

sections.question_synthetic: This is an internal memorandum regarding procedural changes for handling appeals of fines for late-filed statements of economic interest, not a response to a legal question.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is an internal procedural memorandum, not an advice letter responding to a legal question. Document is heavily degraded with OCR errors and missing text. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Extracted procedural details regarding appeal submission and commission review process.

At its meeting on March 7, 1978, the Commission de- cided henceforth to handle fine appeals in the following manner: 1. The appellant's request for appeal will be provided to the commissioners and a date specified by which each must contact the Executive Director if he or she believes the appeal should be placed on the agenda of a regular Commission meeting. 2. An appeal will be placed on the agenda if two or more commissioners so request by the specified date. If one or fewer commissioners so request, the appellant will be informed that the Commission has denied the appeal. MB;jo cc Ted Prim
embedding.summary: Internal FPPC memorandum dated March 14, 1978 from Hickey Bennett to Gina and Ali describing a new procedure for handling appeals of fines for late-filed economic interest statements, effective after a March 7, 1978 Commission meeting.
